prestazioni: Engine: 1GR-FKS 4.0L V6 (304hp stock) – Forced induction via Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel (68mm inducer, 82mm exducer) and Precision Turbo wastegate (46mm), paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping system from Vibrant Performance and a CSF Racing 700hp-rated front-mount intercooler (part #8020).

Fuel System: Upgraded to a Radium Engineering dual-port fuel rail kit (PN: 20-0325) with 1050cc ID1000 injectors, fed by a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump (PN: F90000267) and regulated via an AEM 340lph external fuel pump controller (PN: 30-3300).

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (PN: 23-7100) with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, paired with SPL Pro RTA rear upper control arms (PN: SPL-RTA-4RUNNER) and Whiteline adjustable front sway bar (PN: BMR78XZ) for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Body Kit: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody conversion (PN: RB-TOY4RUNNER-V3) with carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser, finished in Toyota Nitro Black (code 202) with custom matte clear coat from House of Kolor.

Wheels: Volk Racing TE37V (17x9 +12 front, 17x10 +22 rear) in Hyper Silver, wrapped in Nitto Ridge Grappler 285/70R17 (front) and 295/70R17 (rear) tires with Toyo Open Country M/T tread pattern for off-road compliance.

Lighting: Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods (PN: 626111) mounted on a custom fabricated aluminum roof rack (designed by Prinsu Designs, PN: PR-4RUNNER-ROOF-RACK) with a Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED light bar (PN: 20" 910113) for auxiliary illumination.
